paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.12 as of 2026-07-20, representing a 1.16 percent increase from the prior close and a 31.77 percent decrease over the last 20 sessions. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

Recent news is driven by the announcement of Fermi Inc.'s second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which was reported by FinanzNachrichten.de on 2026-07-20. The earnings call is scheduled to take place on August 13, 2026.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including a SCHEDULE 13G and an 8-K filing related to the issuance of convertible senior notes due 2031, with total net proceeds of approximately $416.81 million. Another 8-K filing disclosed the resignation of director Miles Everson, effective July 10, 2026, due to a disagreement over access to company books and records.
